vocab.meaning: sự tò mò về thực vật học
vocab.example: Growing a Venus flytrap as a child really piqued my botanical curiosity due to its carnivorous nature.
My grandfather taught me how to properly tender the soil before planting any seeds to ensure they had enough nutrients.
We had a beautiful perennial hibiscus in the front yard that seemed to grow sturdier with every passing year.
I remember waiting impatiently all winter for the cherry blossoms to finally burst into color in early spring.

vocab.meaning: phát triển tốt dưới sự chăm sóc của ai đó
vocab.example: It was immensely gratifying to see the orchids thrive under my care, despite their reputation for being temperamental.
We used to make our own organic fertilizer from kitchen scraps to help our backyard tomatoes grow larger.

vocab.meaning: kiên cường, có sức sống mãnh liệt
vocab.example: Cacti are incredibly resilient plants, which made them the perfect choice for a forgetful child like me.
I learned how to propagate succulents from just a single leaf, which felt like a magic trick to my younger self.
It was heartbreaking to watch my first sunflower wither away because I had accidentally overwatered it.

vocab.meaning: ốc đảo xanh (không gian xanh tươi giữa đô thị)
vocab.example: My family turned our small concrete balcony into a green oasis filled with herbs and small shrubs.
